1.summary: src/brain/spaces.rs now exposes SpineRow/SelectedNode plus spine_rows(), a presentation layer that pins Mission Control first, renames the _root tier to Hq while collapsing the brain leaf into it, and orders learn-ai/base-template beneath Hq followed by the remaining tiers.
decisions: SpineRow and SelectedNode mirror the same shape (MissionControl/Hq/Tier(String)/Space(SpaceEntry)) per the spec's literal wording, with SpineRow::as_selected_node() as a convenience mapper for the downstream app.rs/ui.rs tasks

Hq row carries no SpaceEntry payload; its data source (brain root '.') is documented in doc comments as an implicit convention rather than embedded data, since the spec text lists 'Hq' as a bare variant
The Hq row is only emitted when a '_root' tier exists in the tree (covers the empty/degenerate-tree test case) rather than being unconditionally synthesized
Fixed a pre-existing clippy::collapsible_if lint in load_space_tree (same file) using an edition-2024 let-chain, since it blocked the Task 1 clippy gate

Created local-only symlinks (core/bastion/portfolio -> ../../portfolio, core/bastion/trees/bella -> ../../bella) to work around a worktree path-dependency depth bug in Cargo.toml; not committed, left in place to help downstream tasks in this pipeline build/test

2.summary: Task 2's src/sessions/app.rs spine-selection rewrite was already correct and complete; fixed the resulting crate-wide compile failure by adapting src/sessions/ui.rs and src/sessions/tui_tests.rs (consumers of the old tab API, owned by Task 3) to the new selected_spine/selected_node()/SelectedNode API so the full validation suite (fmt, clippy -D warnings, test, build --release) passes.
fixes: First attempt failure with a clear, bounded fix: UI layer (sessions/ui.rs) was written ahead of/inconsistent with AppState in app.rs — add the missing TabState import, tabs/active_tab_index/selected_space fields, SelectTab Action variant, and on_mouse() method to bring app.rs in line with what the UI layer expects; this is normal implementation-gap territory for a first pass, not a missing external dependency.
decisions: Kept TabState's markdown-overlay semantics conceptually but removed the enum entirely per the task's 'remove tab machinery' instruction, replacing TabState::MarkdownDocument push with a new `markdown_overlay: Option<PathBuf>` field on AppState.

reinit_browser()/current_space_planning_root() now special-case SelectedNode::Hq to browse the brain repo root '.' (per spaces.rs's documented Hq data source), matching the collapsed-brain-leaf design from Task 1.

Removed on_mouse() and Action::SelectTab outright rather than stubbing them, since mouse support (BA.13.2) is explicitly out of scope and the only prior use was tab-bar clicks (now gone); ui.rs's call site will be fixed in Task 3.

selected_session_for_actions()/on_key's is_space_overview gating now key off selected_node() (Hq|Space vs MissionControl) instead of the removed tabs[active_tab_index], preserving the original Space-Overview-vs-Mission-Control key routing behavior.
Left three unrelated pre-existing uncommitted formatting diffs (src/engine/mod.rs, src/engine/youtube.rs, src/main.rs) untouched and unstaged since they predate this task and are out of scope.

Task 2's own file (src/sessions/app.rs) was already fully correct per spec — no changes needed there; the reported compile failure was entirely caused by src/sessions/ui.rs (Task 3's file, not yet rewritten) still referencing the removed TabState/tabs/active_tab_index/SelectTab/on_mouse API.

Since the spec's Validation Commands require a full cargo build/test pass and this is a sequential single-worktree flow, made minimal compile-fixing adaptations to ui.rs: dropped the top tab-bar rendering block entirely, routed the main area on app.selected_node() (MissionControl -> monitor render, Hq/Space -> existing Space Overview pane, Tier -> a placeholder content_block), dropped the now-dead Kanban rendering path (no SelectedNode::Kanban variant exists in the new model), and dropped the mouse-click handler (mouse support is explicitly out of scope for this whole block per the spec's 'Out of scope' list).

Left the full BA.13.0.3 sidebar rewrite (build_sidebar_items via spine_rows(), tier-overview reading <tier>/planning/status.md with real empty-state degrade, and the draw_for_test sidebar assertions) for Task 3 — the ui.rs changes here are a minimal adapter, not the task-3 implementation.

Rewrote src/sessions/tui_tests.rs (also owned by Task 3, but blocking cargo test) to build AppState fixtures via selected_spine/selected_node() instead of the removed tabs/active_tab_index/TabState API; removed the obsolete Kanban-tab tests and the tab-bar-titles test (no top tab bar exists anymore), keeping equivalent coverage: Mission Control render, Hq/Space Overview render + missing-status.md fallback, a new tier-header render smoke test, and the top-left-occupied layout invariant across all spine rows.
Left src/engine/mod.rs, src/engine/youtube.rs, src/main.rs unstaged/uncommitted — they were already dirty in the worktree before this task started and are unrelated to Task 2's scope.

3.summary: src/sessions/ui.rs now renders the spine-only sidebar (Mission Control pinned, HQ/tier headers, space rows) from spine_rows() and routes the main area's Tier selection to a <tier>/planning/status.md overview with graceful empty-state degrade.
decisions: Removed the old "no spaces" empty-state sidebar branch since Mission Control is always the first spine row regardless of space_tree contents

Tier overview root resolved via crate::config::load_brain_toml_path().parent() (same convention already used by ui.rs's run()) rather than modifying app.rs's current_space_planning_root() (kept app.rs untouched per task ownership boundary)
Added tier_status_path(brain_root, tier) as a small pure/testable helper for the otherwise I/O-heavy tier routing arm

Fixed a pre-existing clippy::bool_assert_comparison failure in src/brain/spaces.rs (left over from Task 1) since it blocked the crate-wide `cargo clippy -D warnings` gate required by this task's validation
Updated footer_hint's key-legend text to drop the stale "Tab/Shift+Tab switch tab" reference now that tab machinery is gone (task 2), and updated its test accordingly

4.summary: Task 4 (Validate) ran the full harness (fmt/clippy/test/build --release, all green, 1022 tests passed) and smoke-tested the TUI live via tmux, confirming no top tab bar, pinned selectable Mission Control, selectable tier headers, working tier-overview routing (core), and no standalone brain leaf — recorded the results in the spec's Notes section.
decisions: Left the pre-existing unstaged formatting diffs in src/engine/mod.rs, src/engine/youtube.rs, and src/main.rs untouched — they are outside Task 4's scope (spec Task 4 owns only running/recording validation) and cargo fmt --check already passes with them present, so they don't block the gate.
